calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Oct-09-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Continued To Oct-13-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Holger Siegwart (Administrator) appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

Mr. Siegwart stated that the reserve was transferred to the Beneficiary last week, that due to complications his response to the Examiner's notes did not get filed on time and that it was filed yesterday. The Court stated that what was filed is a notice of wire transfer and that it needs to be a signed receipt from the Beneficiary. Mr. Holger stated that they wanted it to be paid out to the Beneficiary and the Daughter due to tax issues in Germany, and that the Beneficiary is elderly. Status on distribution of the reserve is continued to October 13, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The receipts are to be filed one week prior.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-09-2020 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matthew Shauer for personal representative.

Mr. Shauer stated that he is embarrassed that he confused filing and serving a petition for final distribution for another case when he thought it was for this case, and that the petition for final distribution is pending on efiling as of last Friday.

The petition for approval of report of status of administration and request for extension of time to administer estate and Order to Appear are off calendar. The status hearing on close of estate is continued to March 9, 2020 pending the efiled transaction of the petition.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: Anasse. Matter not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Continued To Mar-09-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-03-2020 Continued To Feb-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matthew Schauer for Administrator Holger Siegwart

The Court enquired why no petition for final distribution has been filed. Mr. Schauer stated that he thought it was filed.

10:30am The Court passes the matter for Mr. Schauer to find out the status of the filing from his office/client.

11:15am The matter is re-called. Mr. Schauer is not present.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on February 24, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to report back on the status of filing the petition. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joeseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-03-2020 Continued To Feb-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Bond
Off Calendar Feb-03-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Bond
Off Calendar Dec-11-2019 Continued To Feb-03-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Schauer for Holger Siegwart (Administrator).

Mr. Schauer stated that he submitted the petition to increase bond and that his understanding is that it needs to be reviewed and signed. The Court stated that its understanding is that the local rules were not followed, and that Counsel needs to find out what's wrong and correct it and get it filed. Mr. Schauer stated that Fidelity found that the account is rightfully property of the estate, that he will file a final inventory today and that they will be ready for final distribution. Status on bond and status on close of estate is continued to February 3, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-11-2019 Continued To Feb-03-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Continued To Dec-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Schauer for Holger Siegwart (Administrator).

The Court questions why a final inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Mr. Schauer stated that he e-filed a report yesterday, that there is a 401K account showing the Decedent's Mother as the Beneficiary, that they are working with/assisting the Mother, that somehow the wires got crossed and Fidelity transferred the 401K account to the estate account and that they are trying to establish if this is an estate asset. Mr. Schauer also stated that they are hoping to get this resolved this week and that they will then be ready for final distribution. The Court informed Counsel that the current bond amount is inadequate. Mr. Schauer stated that he will deal with the bond issue today. Mr. Schauer is to increase bond by Friday. Status on close of estate is continued to December 11, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar. Status of bond is also set for December 11, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Continued To Nov-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on November 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Continued To Oct-16-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Schauer for Holger Siegwart (Administrator).

Mr. Schauer stated that the estate is ready to close, that he needs a short continuance to finish the accounting and that it can be filed by the end of the month. Status on close of estate is continued to October 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition By Holger Siegwart, Proposed Administrator, For Prior Approval Of Right To Compensation As Administrator And For Services As Attorney For The Administrator
Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Holger Siegwart in Propria Persona

Mr. Seigwart stated that he was nominated to serve as Administrator, the decedent was a citizen of Germany, the beneficiary is in Germany and does not speak English, and his ability to serve as administrator and attorney would save the estate money by avoiding the need to hire an interpreter, and a tax attorney in Germany. Mr. Seigwart also stated that Germany inheritance tax returns need to be filed in Germany, that there would be a language and cultural barrier, that the legal systems in Germany and California do not match, and that it would be difficult for a California attorney to handle the estate with a resident in Germany. The Petition for Prior Approval of Right to Compensation as Administrator and for Services as Attorney for the Administrator is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
